tasks.title: Entity Registry / Data Hub
tasks.description: Build canonical entity registry with one hazeydata_id per physical attraction. Cross-reference TouringPlans dimEntity, queue-times IDs, and other sources. Fix 182+ unmapped queue-times entities polluting fact tables.
tasks.notes: Barney created data-hub repo with Pydantic models and design doc. Wilma extracted QT entities (182 unmapped across 11 parks, 74 missing names in TDL/TDS). dimEntity.csv copied. Committed to hazeydata/data-hub on main. Source: #barney-wilma-dev, #entity-registry.

tasks.title: Fix Firecrawl async API bug
tasks.description: firecrawl_batch_scraper.py expects synchronous data but Extract API v1 is async. Needs polling loop: POST /v1/extract → get job ID → GET /v1/extract/{id} until completed.
tasks.notes: Discovered by Wilma overnight while running entity-registry tasks. 0/8 districts succeeded. Source: #entity-registry.

tasks.title: Monitor v4 first production run
tasks.description: v4 pipeline merged to main (PR #9). First production run at 6 AM March 10. Monitor all 12 steps, verify AK improvement, confirm WTI numbers match shadow predictions.
tasks.notes: v4 pillars: (1) synthetic scoring, (2) multi-candidate model selection, (3) adaptive per-park quantile mapping. Expected: AK 8.7→12.2, UH 11.6→7.0, EU 25.4→22.7. Alarm set for 6:30am. Source: #pipeline.

tasks.title: AK model underprediction during Spring Break
tasks.description: AK predicting 8.5-9.9 WTI (Ghost Town) during Spring Break week when actuals are 19-28. Root cause: pre-2015 half-day park data dragging predictions down. v4 should help but needs verification.
tasks.notes: Barney confirmed: pre-2015 AK mean WTI 12.1 vs post-2015 20.7. v4 shadow #3 moved AK from 8.7→13.3 (better but still under). Auto-tweets paused for AK until verified. Source: #twitter-x, #barney.

tasks.title: Afternoon prediction tweets (ON HOLD)
tasks.description: Auto-tweet afternoon predictions (3 PM cron) for tomorrow's WTI. Currently disabled due to AK model issues.
tasks.notes: Fred said 'put a hold on afternoon tweets until we get predictions better'. Afternoon cron disabled. Morning tweet (yesterday's observed WTI) still active. Re-enable after v4 is verified. Source: #twitter-x.

tasks.title: Model Competition Framework
tasks.description: Build prediction ledger, evaluation harness, challenger template, and blend analysis for comparing multiple models per entity. First real challenger by March 21.
tasks.notes: Design doc at ~/clawd-anthropic/docs/MODEL_COMPETITION_DESIGN.md. Key: per-entity evaluation, raw predictions stored, tournament format. Assignment posted to #barney. Source: #barney.

tasks.title: Pipeline Twins / Blue-Green Deploy for bot
tasks.description: Implement read-only snapshots (Option C) so bot never fails during pipeline updates. Pipeline writes to staging, atomically swaps symlink when done.
tasks.notes: Three options evaluated: A (symlink swap), B (dual DuckDB), C (read-only snapshots). Fred prefers C. Barney consulted. Source: #ideas 'Pipeline twins', #barney.

tasks.title: Unhosted Twitch Stream (Data TV)

tasks.title: Per-park quantile mapping configuration

tasks.notes: Barney recommended as v3.1 improvement (now v4.1). Global 1.5x cap better than uncapped but needs tuning. Feb 26 uncapped: CA +34.3, IA +16.1, MK +13.4 errors. Source: #pipeline.
